description: playboy is all about living life with a little style and pleasure, if you aren't afraid to be yourself then feel free to express your cheeky side with this stylish watch. Fashionable, feminine and the highest quality construction - you'll be turning heads for all the right reasons! Case diameter: 37 mm Case thickness: 5 mm Dial shape: Round Warranty: 1 year Stainless steel round case with crystal embellishments Pink genuine leather strap with a tang clasp Pink dial with white hands Playboy branding on the dial Screw to reset time Solid case back made of stainless steel for enhanced durability
